turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hi , carolyn . how is carolyn ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: good . how is the doctor ?

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: the doctor is good . is carolyn ready to get started ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes , carolyn is .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so carolyn is a 49-year-old female here for follow-up of carolyn's chronic problems . so , how is carolyn doing , carolyn ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: carolyn is doing okay . um , carolyn's osteoarthritis has been flaring up a little bit lately , um , so carolyn wants to get- talk about carolyn's osteoarthritis primarily . so , carolyn's osteoarthritis is mostly in um , carolyn's elbows and carolyn's osteoarthritis has really been bothering carolyn . carolyn has been sitting at the computer , at the desk more , um , in the office so carolyn does n't know if being stagnant in that position all day has um , increased flare-ups for carolyn's osteoarthritis , but carolyn wanted to talk to the doctor about carolyn's osteoarthritis .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , sure . and , is carolyn right or left-handed ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: carolyn is right-handed .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , and does one elbow bother carolyn more than the other ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: carolyn's right elbow does bother carolyn more than the other elbow , but primarily , carolyn is typing all day versus writing , so carolyn's osteoarthritis flares up in both elbows .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right , and um , any other joint pain ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no , just- just really focused on carolyn's elbows .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , and any numbing or tingling in carolyn's hands ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , sometimes . when carolyn is typing for long periods of time , carolyn feels a little bit of numbing , um , carolyn tries to shake out carolyn's arms a little bit . um , just to kind of relieve the numbing um , sensation .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right , and the doctor knows that carolyn has had this also , had this history of gout . and the last episode carolyn had was about three months ago . carolyn had some inflammation of carolyn's toe . has carolyn had any other issues with gout ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no , carolyn have n't . um , the medication the doctor gave carolyn really controlled gout , and carolyn have n't seen a gout flare-up since .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right , and how is carolyn doing with carolyn's psoriasis ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: carolyn's psoriasis has been under control too . carolyn's psoriasis has n't been a- a major problem for carolyn either .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . the doctor- the doctor knows that the doctor had given carolyn some clobetasol for carolyn's scalp . is clobetasol- so clobetasol is doing okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , clobetasol is doing a lot better .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , great . um , all right , well , the doctor 'd like to go ahead and do a physical exam on carolyn .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: let's first look at carolyn's vital signs . hey , dragon , show the doctor the vital signs . great , so everything looks good from the vital signs perspective . um , so looking at carolyn , the doctor do n't appreciate any cervical lymphadenopathy . carolyn's heart is a nice regular rate and rhythm , and carolyn's lungs sound really clear . on carolyn's right elbow , carolyn do have some edema and inflammation of carolyn's right olecranon and there's some tenderness and an effusion right there . so um , does the right olecranon area hurt when the doctor press the right olecranon area ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , the doctor's pressing the right olecranon area does hurt .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , and when the doctor turn carolyn's arm , does carolyn have pain ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , turning carolyn's arm hurts a bit too .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , so carolyn has pain- to palpation of the olecranon bursa and pain with pronation and supination . and when carolyn flex- and when carolyn bend the arm and straighten the arm , does bending and straightening the arm hurt ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , bending and straightening the arm does and bending and straightening the arm is a bit stiff too .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , so pain with flexion and extension of the right arm . uh , carolyn's abdomen is nice and soft , and there's no lower extremity edema . uh , let's go ahead and take a look at some of carolyn's labs . the doctor know , carolyn have a lot of arthritis for someone so young , so the doctor had sent off that autoimmune panel . hey , dragon . show the doctor the autoimmune labs . hey , dragon . show the doctor the autoimmune profile . hey , dragon . show the doctor the esr . okay , so the esr is good . hey , dragon . show the doctor the uric acid . okay . all right , well , good . that's great . so , the doctor know , the autoimmune labs does n't look like carolyn have any systemic arthritis , or sys- systemic inflammatory in process going on . so , the doctor's impression of carolyn at this time is that from a gout standpoint , everything is nice and stable . the doctor think that the doctor should continue carolyn on the colchicine 0.6 milligrams twice a day as needed for flare-ups of carolyn's gout . um , and then for carolyn's osteoarthritis , the doctor 'd like to go ahead and order a right elbow x-ray . hey , dragon . order a right elbow x-ray , and then the doctor 'd like to prescribe some meloxicam 15 milligrams once a day for the pain and the swelling .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey , dragon . order meloxicam 15 milligrams once a day . and then the doctor 'd like to um , just see the right elbow x-ray- how- the right elbow x-ray show- shows up and the results of the right elbow x-ray before the doctor refer carolyn for any type of physical therapy , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and then from a psoriasis standpoint , the doctor think everything is stable . the doctor will continue carolyn on the steroid cream for carolyn's scalp , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: that sounds good .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right , does carolyn have any questions ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no , that's it .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right , take care .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: thank the doctor .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey , dragon . finalize the note .
